description_long: This is a pair of round-lensed eyeglasses with a thin, metallic frame that encircles each lens completely. The frame features a classic, minimalist design with slender temples that curve gently at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The lenses are dark-tinted, providing a high level of opacity and likely intended for sun protection. The bridge is a simple, narrow metal piece connecting the two lenses, with small, adjustable nose pads for comfort and stability. The temples are straight and unadorned, maintaining the understated aesthetic of the glasses. No visible branding or decorative embellishments are present, emphasizing a timeless and functional style.
description: A pair of round, dark-lensed glasses with a thin, full-metal frame and minimalist design. The temples are slender and curve at the ends, with no visible branding or embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round lenses, thin full-rim frame, and the simple bridge with nose pads.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slender, straight temples and the curvature at the ear ends.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical round lenses and the open, curved temples extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin temple and the attachment to the lens frame.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is round in geometry, featuring a thin, full-rim structure that completely encircles each lens. The temples are slender and straight, curving gently at the ends, with no additional embellishments or thickness variations. The overall style is minimalist and classic, with a focus on simplicity and functionality.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark gray with a uniform tint, providing high opacity and a solid, non-gradient appearance. There are no mirrored or special effects visible.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, narrow metal piece connecting the two lenses, equipped with small, adjustable nose pads for comfort. It is a standard saddle style with no decorative features.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a gentle curve at the ends for ear support. There are no visible patterns, engravings, or embellishments.
